title: Korean Quiche with Glassy Egg
description: A twist on traditional quiche, this Indian-inspired dish combines the flavors of Korea with a rich, glassy egg.

ingredients.name: Jelly
ingredients.notes: Use a spicy Korean chili jelly for added flavor

instructions: Roll out the quiche crust and place in a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the glassy egg, Korean chili flakes, garam masala, salt, and black pepper.
Add the jelly to the egg mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the quiche crust.
If using cheese, sprinkle on top of the egg mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the quiche is set and golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional Korean chili flakes if desired.
Enjoy with a side of naan or rice for a complete Indian-inspired breakfast.
